positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical geometric pattern featuring interconnected woodland creatures and celestial motifs. The main elements include simplified silhouettes of bears, deer, and owls interwoven with constellations, moons, and abstract forest foliage. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern linework, utilizing strong, deep indigo blues, sage greens, and warm burnt orange accents against a creamy off-white background. The composition must be perfect for wrapping around fabric, maintaining high contrast and negative space. Focus on crisp, single-line detail and clean, repeatable patterns. Studio lighting, vector art style, maximalist symmetry, apparel print design, seamless repeating pattern.
negative: blur, artifact, text, watermark, low resolution, bad anatomy, noise, extra limbs, messy, grainy, photographic, photo-realistic, graffiti, complex shading
